steps.title: Read the graphed line
steps.content:
From the graph, line $g$ passes through $(-10,12)$ and $(0,1)$. Its slope is:
$$\frac{12-1}{-10-0}=-\frac{11}{10}$$
So its equation is $$y=-\frac{11}{10}x+1$$

steps.title: Match the same line
steps.content:
For infinitely many solutions, multiply by $15$:
$$15(11x+10y)=15(10)$$
$$165x+150y=150$$

steps.title: Add the constants
steps.content: Thus $$p=150$$ and $$w=150$$, so: $$p+w=150+150=300$$ The answer is 300.
